pi_items.source: export_result.sh specifies this exact path to check for task success.
setup_task.sh generates the synthetic photo at this exact path.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires correlating a synthetic DICOM CT scan with a synthetic clinical photo generated at /home/ga/Desktop/clinical_photo.jpg. The expected outcome is a screenshot saved to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/multimodal_comparison.png.
